name: Google Shape;61;p14
text: Brief about the idea
textPreview: Brief about the idea

name: Google Shape;62;p14
text:
CivicMind AI is an AI-powered Decision Intelligence Platform for smart city operations. It combines civic datasets, BigQuery analytics, Gemini-powered agents, RAG over city SOPs, and Looker dashboards to help public teams detect issues, ask questions in natural language, forecast risk, and choose the next best action.

The prototype focuses on urban operations: citizen complaints, waste collection, waterlogging, utility outages, traffic incidents, environmental metrics, and public-service workflows. Instead of showing disconnected reports, it turns scattered community data into explainable recommendations that city teams can review and act on.
textPreview: CivicMind AI is an AI-powered Decision Intelligence Platform for smart city operations. It combines civic datasets, BigQuery analytics, G...

title: How the solution meets the challenge

name: approach-title
text: How the solution meets the challenge
textPreview: How the solution meets the challenge

name: approach-1
text:
Problem fit
Fragmented civic data slows decisions across complaints, transport, utilities, waste, environment, and emergency workflows.
textPreview: Problem fit | Fragmented civic data slows decisions across complaints, transport, utilities, waste, environment, and emergency workflows.

name: approach-2
text:
Google Cloud build
Storage and Functions ingest data; BigQuery analyzes it; Gemini and ADK coordinate multi-agent reasoning.
textPreview: Google Cloud build | Storage and Functions ingest data; BigQuery analyzes it; Gemini and ADK coordinate multi-agent reasoning.

name: approach-3
text:
Decision output
RAG grounds answers in SOPs; agents rank actions; Cloud Run and Looker deliver app, dashboard, and reports.
textPreview: Decision output | RAG grounds answers in SOPs; agents rank actions; Cloud Run and Looker deliver app, dashboard, and reports.

name: approach-impact
text: Real-world impact: city teams detect spikes earlier, prioritize scarce resources, explain decisions with evidence, and keep humans in the approval loop before any civic action is executed.
textPreview: Real-world impact: city teams detect spikes earlier, prioritize scarce resources, explain decisions with evidence, and keep humans in the...

name: approach-caption
text: Core workflow: ask a question -> retrieve trusted data -> detect anomalies -> apply policy context -> recommend next action -> generate an approval-ready summary.
textPreview: Core workflow: ask a question -> retrieve trusted data -> detect anomalies -> apply policy context -> recommend next action -> generate a...

name: Google Shape;76;p16
text: Opportunities
textPreview: Opportunities

name: opp-1
text:
Different from existing ideas
Not just a chatbot or dashboard. CivicMind combines analytics, forecasting, RAG, recommendations, and operational workflow in one platform.
textPreview: Different from existing ideas | Not just a chatbot or dashboard. CivicMind combines analytics, forecasting, RAG, recommendations, and ope...

name: opp-2
text:
USP
Every action is explainable: tied to BigQuery evidence, anomaly signals, policy/SOP grounding, owner, severity, and expected impact.
textPreview: USP | Every action is explainable: tied to BigQuery evidence, anomaly signals, policy/SOP grounding, owner, severity, and expected impact.

name: opp-3
text:
Scale advantage
The same modular Cloud Run + BigQuery + ADK architecture can serve a campus, ward, district, or full smart-city deployment.
textPreview: Scale advantage | The same modular Cloud Run + BigQuery + ADK architecture can serve a campus, ward, district, or full smart-city deploym...

name: opp-human
text: Human-in-the-loop by design: AI recommends and explains; city officials approve and act. That makes the solution practical for sensitive civic operations where accountability matters.
textPreview: Human-in-the-loop by design: AI recommends and explains; city officials approve and act. That makes the solution practical for sensitive ...

name: opp-pitch
text: Unique pitch: a civic operations co-pilot that turns noisy community signals into ranked, auditable interventions.
textPreview: Unique pitch: a civic operations co-pilot that turns noisy community signals into ranked, auditable interventions.

title: List of features offered by the solution

name: Google Shape;83;p17
text: List of features offered by the solution
textPreview: List of features offered by the solution

name: Google Shape;84;p17
text:
1. Natural-language city analytics over BigQuery civic datasets.
2. Ward-level risk scoring for complaints, traffic, utilities, waste, and environment.
3. Anomaly detection for sudden spikes such as garbage overflow, outage clusters, waterlogging, or congestion.
4. AI-generated action recommendations with severity, affected population, owner, confidence, and expected impact.
5. RAG-backed policy assistant for SOPs, escalation rules, disaster guides, and civic service documents.
6. Executive Looker dashboard for KPIs, heatmaps, category trends, open alerts, and response status.
7. Daily/weekly Gemini reports for ward officers and administrators.
8. Responsible-AI controls: citations, uncertainty, PII minimization, audit logging, and human approval.
textPreview: 1. Natural-language city analytics over BigQuery civic datasets. | 2. Ward-level risk scoring for complaints, traffic, utilities, waste, ...

title: Technologies / Google / Nvidia Services used in the solution

name: Google Shape;111;p21
text:
Technologies / Google / Nvidia Services used in the solution
(Why did you choose your specific AI stack and system design, and how does it support scalability and real-world deployment?)
textPreview: Technologies / Google / Nvidia Services used in the solution | (Why did you choose your specific AI stack and system design, and how does...

name: Google Shape;112;p21
text:
Google Cloud services used

• BigQuery: analytics warehouse, SQL insights, ward-level risk features, natural-language data grounding.
• Cloud Storage: raw data lake for CSVs, civic docs, images, and historical reports.
• Cloud Functions / Cloud Run jobs: event-driven ingestion, cleaning, scheduled refresh, and alert generation.
• Cloud Run: scalable backend APIs, ADK agent service, and web prototype deployment.
• Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform / Vertex AI + Gemini: reasoning, summarization, recommendations, and report generation.
• Agent Development Kit: coordinator, analyst, anomaly, recommendation, policy/RAG, and report agents.
• Vector Search / RAG: trusted retrieval from SOPs, policies, emergency guides, and historical reports.
• Looker / Looker Studio: dashboards, heatmaps, category trends, and stakeholder reporting.
• Cloud Scheduler, Logging, Monitoring, IAM, Secret Manager: production-readiness, reliability, and secure operations.
textPreview: Google Cloud services used |  | • BigQuery: analytics warehouse, SQL insights, ward-level risk features, natural-language data grounding....

text: All solutions must leverage Google Cloud technologies. NVIDIA technologies should be included by teams that have selected the NVIDIA problem statement.
